name: ripgrep
description: Fast line-oriented search tool (rg). Artifact is the upstream Linux x86_64 musl tarball; pick another release asset and sha256 for macOS or ARM.
usage: Recursive search: rg PATTERN [PATH]. Useful flags: -n (line numbers), -l (files with matches), -i (ignore case), --type rust (filter by type). Prefer rg over grep for code search; respects .gitignore by default.

model.summary: CLI code search; fast, gitignore-aware alternative to grep.
